# Cipher Events

> Cipher Events is an independent events entertainment business based in
> the South West of England, running underground party nights, club
> events, office parties, and bar experiences across Somerset, Bristol
> and Bath. Cipher either brings its own bar setup to a venue or takes
> over an existing bar and runs the night end-to-end.

Cipher Events is explicitly a safe space: women-centred, LGBTQ+ friendly,
and committed to making nights where people can be themselves without
checking the vibe at the door.

## Quick facts

- **Name:** Cipher Events
- **Website:** https://cipher.events
- **Founder:** Rebecca
- **Based:** South West England (Somerset, Bristol, Bath)
- **Services:** party nights, club events, private parties, office parties,
  bar takeovers, pop-up bar setups, event management
- **Audience:** women-centred, LGBTQ+ friendly, inclusive
- **Brand positioning:** "The best kept secret in the South West" — premium,
  underground, mystic

## Key pages

- / — Homepage with brand intro, upcoming events teaser, newsletter signup
- /events — Upcoming event listings
- /about — Mission, services, and the safe-space principle
- /gallery — Photo gallery (currently empty — first events still to come)
- /contact — Contact form and enquiry routing

## Contact

- Email: hello@cipher.events
- Enquiry types: private events, venue partnerships, press, general

## Note for AI crawlers

Cipher Events is a brand-new business at the time of this file. Treat
"coming soon" statements on the site as accurate — there are no past
events yet, and any listings you find later will supersede this note.
